reviews.review_description: As a trainer, RAUM has revolutionized how I conduct sessions. The immersive environment keeps participants engaged, and the interactive tools make complex concepts easier to explain. My training effectiveness has improved significantly.

The customization options in RAUM are incredible. We've created branded virtual spaces that perfectly represent our company. It's not just a meeting tool - it's an extension of our brand identity in the virtual world.
I appreciate RAUM's commitment to continuous improvement. Regular updates and new features show they're dedicated to making the platform even better.
RAUM's competitive pricing combined with its enterprise features makes it an easy choice for our organization.
The onboarding process with RAUM was seamless. Our IT team was impressed with the documentation and support provided.

RAUM bridges the gap between physical and virtual meetings beautifully. The sense of space and presence makes discussions more natural and productive. It's become an essential tool for our organization.
finally something that makes remote work feel less lonely. its like beeing in the office again
The workspace customization in RAUM allows us to create environments that truly inspire creativity. Our team has become more innovative since we started using the platform.
the customization options are insane. we built our own branded meeting room
10/10 would recommend. our productivity went up since we started using raum
great app, easy to use. my boss loves it too haha
RAUM has streamlined our workflow significantly. What used to take multiple calls now happens in one productive session.

I've tried Arthur, Glue, and several other VR collaboration tools, but RAUM stands out. The business-focused design and enterprise-ready features make it the clear winner for professional use. Our board meetings in RAUM feel more engaging than in-person ones!	B
Since adopting RAUM, our remote team feels more connected than ever. It's not just about meetings - it's about building relationships.
wow this is actualy really good for meetings. way better than zoom calls where everyone is distracted
What I value most about RAUM is the sense of teamwork it creates. Even complex projects feel manageable when collaborating in this environment.
Our team's morale has improved since we started using RAUM. The engaging environment makes work feel less monotonous.

What sets RAUM apart is the attention to detail in creating a truly professional environment. Unlike other VR platforms that feel gamey or informal, RAUM strikes the perfect balance between engagement and business professionalism. Our clients are always impressed when we host meetings here.
my team was hesitant at first but now everyone wants to meet in raum lol
I love how RAUM keeps everyone engaged. Unlike video calls where people zone out, the immersive environment ensures active participation throughout the meeting.
the spatial audio is so good. you can actually tell where people are standing
really cool experience. the presence feeling is unreal

If you are looking for a enterprise Metaverse system, RAUM is the way to go. Out of the box you get what you need for collaboration, education or exhibitions. But if you want more, you can get your assets easily into your virtual spaces. PDF, video files, images and 3D objects using a web backend. And everything in a high quality visual optic. Service is great and always helpful. A German company with very high privacy standards.
The level of presence in RAUM is unmatched. During meetings, I often forget I'm not physically with my colleagues. This sense of connection has greatly improved our team dynamics and communication.
had some audio issues in the begining but support fixed it quick. platform itself is great
RAUM has become an integral part of our company culture. It's how we connect, collaborate, and create.
The ability to share and collaborate on 3D models in RAUM has been invaluable for our design team. We can review prototypes together in real-time, making the feedback process much more efficient.
RAUM creates an environment where creativity flourishes. Our design team has produced some of their best work using this platform.
RAUM offers an unparalleled level of professionalism in VR collaboration. Every aspect is designed with business users in mind.
The professional environment in RAUM sets the right tone for business discussions. It's serious when it needs to be.
The ROI on RAUM has been remarkable. Reduced travel costs, improved collaboration, and higher engagement - it's paying for itself many times over.
RAUM delivers on its promise of professional VR collaboration. It's reliable, feature-rich, and truly enterprise-ready.
used it for a workshop yesterday. 3 hours flew by. never happend in a zoom call before haha
RAUM combines the best of virtual reality with practical business applications. It's the future of work, available today.
nice platform, works well. only issue was my headset battery died in the middle of a meeting haha
RAUM perfectly balances immersion with usability. It's sophisticated enough for complex collaboration but simple enough for daily use.
The way RAUM handles group dynamics is impressive. Everyone feels included and heard, even in larger meetings.
I've been recommending RAUM to colleagues and clients alike. It's truly a standout platform in the VR space.
RAUM's enterprise features are exactly what we needed. Security, scalability, and customization - all handled professionally.
used it for a client presentation yesterday and they were blown away. definetly using this again
What makes this special is the human connection it enables. Despite being virtual, interactions feel genuine and meaningful.
I've been using the app for six months now and can't imagine going back to traditional video conferencing. It's simply better.
I recommend RAUM to any company looking to enhance their virtual collaboration. The results speak for themselves.
Raum has become our go-to platform for important client meetings. The professional atmosphere and immersive experience always leave a lasting impression.
this is what virtual collaboration should be like. no more boring video calls
the virtual spaces are so well designed. feels professional not like other vr stuff thats too playful
What sets Raum apart is its reliability. In critical business situations, we can always count on the platform.
The virtual whiteboard and collaboration tools in RAUM are incredibly useful. Brainstorming sessions have become much more productive.
The attention to detail in RAUM is impressive. From avatars to environments, everything feels polished and professional.
RAUM's intuitive interface means less time troubleshooting and more time collaborating. That's exactly what we needed.
Raum makes distance disappear. Working with our international partners feels like we're all in the same room. The communication has never been better.
The spatial audio in raum is fantastic. You can actually tell where people are in the room, making group discussions much more natural.
The VR collaboration platform we didn't know we needed. Now it's central to how we work.
the onboarding was super smooth, didnt need any help to figure things out
super easy to set up and use. even my not so tech savy coworkers got it right away
my first vr meeting ever and it was amazing. felt like i was really there with my colleagues
Raum has helped us reduce meeting fatigue. The immersive environment is refreshing compared to endless video calls.
connection dropped once but thats probably my wifi not the app
solid app. does what it promises. no complaints here

I was truly impressed with the level of focus it fosters. It is remarkable— no distractions, just full immersion. RAUM goes beyond traditional video conferencing; it's a collaborative workspace that feels almost tangible. The interactions feel natural and engaging. We get a real  sense of presence. Overall, RAUM is an exceptional tool, and I’m grateful to have had the chance to experience it during a week training. It has given me a new appreciation for it.

I used the RAUM app for an invite-only meeting from a Facebook group. Compared to some other social VR meeting apps, I liked that we were able to ensure that only the invited people (who received prior an individual code) join without randomly others people dropping into the room. The voice quality was very good even with about 30 people attending the meetup.
Many features I have to play like a instrument. Feel-good are best.

You need to experience it for your self! It‘s amazing how natural it feels to meet as avatars and interact with each other and what an impact gesturing in our communication makes. It is effective and intuitive, you can create prototypes, sketch business concept and so much more. 

This is the future of work!
I use this app to participate at events, I think it's very good and a big potential.

RAUM platform offers a wide variety of environments and elements in their library, which makes it easy to create something quickly. What sets them apart is the ability to deploy entirely custom environments to meet the specific needs of clients. This feature makes RAUM a versatile and flexible platform for any project.

I've been using this virtual collaboration software on a daily basis for company meetings and I couldn't be happier with the results. It's simply perfect and everything runs smoothly without any issues. The visual quality is outstanding, making it a pleasure to use. Highly recommend!

Tired of online meetings in Zoom or MS teams? Do you want to work in an immersive and focused way? If you're looking for a virtual reality solution to bring your team - or external partners and customers - together in a collaborative, immersive environment, RAUM is the answer! 

The range of features is exceptional. With a variety of virtual environments to choose from and endless possibilities for creative storytelling: 6 different "locations" to configure your workspace (more to be announced), a variety of tools, 3D libraries, and customizable avatars make RAUM a premier platform for collaborative work in VR. Since I and my team already use it regularly, I can only recommend giving RAUM a try. The trial Workspace is to use for free.

reviews.review_title: RAUM - meet & collab & so much more
reviews.review_description:
I have seen many apps and experiences in VR and have used other collaboration tools like Miro and Mural on the browser - but what RAUM offers as a tool for collaboration in 3D goes far beyond what a chat and a call plus a browser tool can do.

Being together in a workspace provides an experience that is much closer to the real physical situation than any call could do.

On the other hand, the tools in RAUM that are made available for working are intuitive and easy to understand. So after a short onboarding you are already in the middle of the action.

Especially in the B2B environment, RAUM also demonstrates the special quality that products, both technical and service-related, and processes can be understood much better through 3D visualization, even with little functionalisation, than through anything else - except the physical meeting, of course. Whereby: who has ever been able to scale the product on a trade fair or in a product training to look inside?

All in all a premium tool on the way to the metaverse to do individual and group exploration and to create your own methods and results in workshops, meetings, team activities or presentations.

RAUM is so engaging and well-designed that I lost track of time! And despite not being a big fan of VR, RAUM managed to change my perspective and even sparked ideas for using it beyond work, like connecting with friends and family. That’s my testament to its versatility and user-friendly design. Overall, RAUM has a lot to offer, both for professional collaboration and potentially even for personal connections. I hope sharing my insights might inspire others to give it a try!

If you want to work and collaborate in virtual reality with you team or with external participants like if they are in the same room, RAUM is the way to go. The feature set is incredible: Experience various virtual environments, including many options for spatial storytelling, and the ability to save and resume your progress of your work makes RAUM a great platform to work with. Definitely worth a try !!!

reviews.review_title: Honest and detailed feedback after a lon
reviews.review_description:
I have to write a slightly longer report now, but I hope it helps other people. At first we couldn't imagine how virtual reality and RAUM would work for us until we tried it.

We have used Raum Virtual Collaboration for transformation processes in our global management team and it has proven to be an absolute game changer. This innovative platform has revolutionised the way we work together, making our interactions not only efficient but also enjoyable.

One of the standout features of Raum is its exceptional team management capabilities. With a large and diverse workforce spanning multiple continents, keeping everyone in the loop has always been a challenge. However, Raum's intuitive user interface and comprehensive management tools have made this task seamless and efficient. 

Plus, the ease of use is second to none. Raum's virtual environment is engaging and interactive, making collaboration not only productive, but truly fun. The platform's unique features encourage creativity and innovation, transforming routine meetings into dynamic sessions that our team looks forward to.

To summarise, Raum Virtual Collaboration has exceeded our expectations by streamlining our global management processes and fostering a collaborative and enjoyable working environment. We recommend it to any organisation looking to improve their team collaboration and management capabilities. It is an essential tool for any forward thinking organisation!

When I first heard about RAUM, I thought it was just a nice, cool virtual reality platform that we could use to have meetings in a different way. Then I had the opportunity to attend their training sessions, and from the very beginning, I was very impressed. No kidding! It was so much more than what I expected it to be! What I liked the most was the fact that I was totally focused. Toooootally! I mean, no WhatsApp messages or emails were bothering me. I must confess, I lost track of time, which means I was also very much enjoying myself!

What I learned is that it is a collaborative tool. I mean, if you want to keep sharing screens and PowerPoints on Zoom, go ahead... but if you truly want to work together... you’ve got to try RAUM. Not to mention, it is a state-of-the-art working space. It's almost dangerous, haha—you don't want to leave once you're there. I also really felt the presence of my colleagues. If someone goes to another space, you stop hearing them and have to ask, "Hey, where did you go?" which was fun. So, it's really like being there.

And I'm not a huge fan of VR, but I started admiring it more after getting to know this platform. I even thought of using it to get together with my family since I live abroad. Amazing! Very well done, and I'm thankful I had this opportunity.
It’s made in a way, that you forget that you are in VR. You really feel the connection to the people around you and you can work together like being together for real.

RAUM is a collaboration experience for everyone.  You can work together without the limitation of physical spaces.  Even in compare to teams, WebEx and all of the others, there is no better way wo work together.

RAUM has profoundly transformed the way I work. The captivating environments and exceptional tools create an inspiring and efficient work atmosphere. It's truly an enhancement to my professional life.

reviews.review_title: One of the best vr collaboration
reviews.review_description: Wow - what an experience. Wonderful graphics combined with a big feature set - gettin onboard with up to 20 people in 15 minutes. Great piece of virtual reality software
